source.title: Acme QBR renewal follow-up notes
source.summary: QBR follow-up notes confirm Acme wants the renewal plan to address implementation timeline risk before expanding automation to two additional facilities. Priya and Jordan agreed to prepare a timeline-risk mitigation summary for the renewal pitch.
